skill.name: Trance
skill.description: Melee damage + self buff while active (×1.15 damage).

ultimate.name: Loathsome Hex
ultimate.description: Channelled holy damage projection; scales with character level.

passive.name: Confluence
passive.description: Free Loathsome Hex casts when channels synergise.

7036800.label: L519 Activating Ult
7036800.notes: Also extends Ult-active slightly (longer burst window after activation)

7000902.label: Ultimate Art Gauge +3
7000902.notes: +10% gauge gain → Ult fires ~10% more often → ult_active uptime rises accordingly

7000802.label: Character Skill Cooldown Reduction +3
7000802.notes: 10% skill cooldown reduction → Trance fires 10% more often

7037600.label: Successive Attacks Boost Attack Power +3
7037600.notes: +9% mult on melee damage during continuous attacks (most of boss window)

7037000.label: L522 Phys Boost while Incant Buff

6500900.label: L525 Executing Art readies Skill (Trance loop)
6500900.notes: Trance re-readies after each Ult cast → Trance uptime ~0.95, Ult uptime ~0.55-0.70 with this effect in build

6647400.label: [Undertaker] Improved Dex, Reduced Vigor/Faith
6647400.notes: Net contribution = damage_scaling delta from DEX+ minus FAI-. Good for DEX-scaling variant, bad for STR/FAI default.

6647500.label: [Undertaker] Improved Mind/Faith, Reduced Strength
6647500.notes: Net contribution = damage_scaling delta from FAI+ minus STR-. Good for FAI-heavy variant.
